market: # HOW TO USE — calibrate on LIVE/UPCOMING fixtures (past prices are unrecoverable).
# For each row: find an upcoming fixture whose TiTiBet signal is in that market at
# roughly the target odd in the note. Record TWO numbers for the SAME selection:
#   proxy_odd   = the odd TiTiBet shows for it (its William Hill / sharp line)
#   my_book_odd = the odd betPawa / 888bets / Betway shows for the same selection NOW
# Rows are weighted to your real bet mix from the 100-bet replay: Away/Home Over 0.5
# are ~91% of what the system fires
proxy_odd: so they get the most rows. Spread the checks

market: # across the low/mid/high bands — soft books shade short prices (favourites/overs)

proxy_odd: and the per-market haircut is the average across bands.
